calendar.matters:
Petitioner Arrowood Indemnity Company, As Successor Motion For Issuance Of Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Aug-19-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER ARROWOOD INDEMNITY COMPANY, AS SUCCESSOR'S MOTION FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF MANDATE. No appearances. The court took the matter off calendar in light of notification that the parties resolved the matter. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR #8620

Notice Of Motion For Issuance Of Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Aug-10-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER ARROWOOD INDEMNITY COMPANY, AS SUCCESSOR'S MOTION FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF MANDATE.
Appearances: Sanford Kingsley and John Finston of SNR Denton (882.2430) for petitioner and moving party; David Lew of the Attorney General's Office (510.622.2225) for respondent and opposing party.
Argued and the court took the matter under submission. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
---------
After hearing the court ruled as follows: based on counsels' representation that they are further discussing the matter, the motion is continued to August 19, 2011 at 9:30am.
